ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "year" REAL /* Year of manufacture */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the car */,
  "present_price" REAL /* Present price of the car */,
  "kms_driven" REAL /* Kilometers driven */,
  "owner" INTEGER /* Number of owners */,
  "fuel_type" INTEGER /* Fuel type (0 - Petrol, 1 - Diesel) */,
  "seller_type" INTEGER /* Seller type (0 - Individual, 1 - Dealer) */,
  "transmission_type" INTEGER /* Transmission type (0 - Manual, 1 - Automatic) */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the car */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make or brand of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the car (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Hatchback) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "mileage_per_liter" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the car in kilometers per liter */,
  "engine_capacity" INTEGER /* Engine capacity in cubic centimeters (cc) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the car */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors the car has */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the car */,
  "is_accident_free" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the car has been in an accident */,
  "is_automatically_inspected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the car has been automatically inspected */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the car's warranty expires, if applicable */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the car is currently stored or listed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the car record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the car record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the car was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the car */,
  "is_financed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the sale was financed */,
  "finance_company" TEXT /* Name of the finance company, if applicable */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Down payment amount for the financed sale */,
  "monthly_payment" REAL /* Monthly payment amount for the financed sale */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Loan term in months for the financed sale */,
  "is_trade_in" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the sale included a trade-in */,
  "trade_in_value" REAL /* Value of the trade-in car, if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the customer is subscribed to the dealership's newsletter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who favorited the car */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car favorited */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date when the car was favorited */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment the customer can add about the favorited car */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the favorite record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the favorite record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)
